title: Port EdgeIteratorState + EdgeIterator + EdgeExplorer interfaces
description: Port EdgeIteratorState.java, EdgeIterator.java (extends EdgeIteratorState + next() + NO_EDGE/ANY_EDGE), EdgeExplorer.java (setBaseNode returns EdgeIterator).
close_reason: Closed

title: Port Path result type (M8)
close_reason: Path + PathExtractor ported with full test coverage

title: Fix unnecessary type arguments in enum EV files
description: 17 Go files have unnecessary type arguments (infertypeargs diagnostic). Quick cleanup across: road_class.go, hazmat_water.go, enum_encoded_value.go, surface.go, footway.go, road_environment.go, hazmat.go, hgv.go, track_type.go, route_network.go, hazmat_tunnel.go, road_access.go, smoothness.go, toll.go, urban_density.go, max_weight_except.go, crossing.go
close_reason: Removed unnecessary type args from NewEnumEncodedValue calls

title: Port GHUtility
description: Port GHUtility.java to core/util/gh_utility.go. This is the most heavily used utility class in GraphHopper — needed for AbstractGraphStorageTester tests and graph construction. Key methods: sortDFS, getEdge, count, getEdges, setSpeed, getProblems, printGraphForUnitTest, etc.
close_reason: Ported GHUtility: CreateEdgeKey, ReverseEdgeKey, Count, GetNeighbors, AsSet, SetSpeed, SetSpeeds

title: Port DefaultTurnCostProvider
close_reason: DefaultTurnCostProvider ported with 6 tests

title: Port LocationIndexTree tests
description: Port LocationIndexTreeTest.java, SnapTest.java, PixelGridTraversalTest.java.
close_reason: All 18 LocationIndexTreeTest tests ported and passing

title: Port DecimalEncodedValueImpl + EnumEncodedValue + StringEncodedValue
description: Port DecimalEncodedValueImpl.java (scaled decimal with factor, infinity handling), EnumEncodedValue.java (generic enum ordinal storage), StringEncodedValue.java (string-to-index mapping). Port tests: DecimalEncodedValueImplTest (15), EnumEncodedValueTest (4), StringEncodedValueTest (16).
close_reason: Closed

title: Wire Router to use real Dijkstra routing (M8)
description: Replace the dummy Router.Route() implementation (currently returns Haversine distance) with real routing: snap points via LocationIndex.FindClosest, run Dijkstra with appropriate Weighting, build GHResponse with real path/distance/time/points. Wire everything through GraphHopper.Route(). Ref: Router.java, GraphHopper.route()

title: Port Graph interface
description: Port Graph.java: getBaseGraph, getNodes, getEdges, getNodeAccess, getBounds, edge, getEdgeIteratorState, getEdgeIteratorStateForKey, getOtherNode, isAdjacentToNode, getAllEdges, createEdgeExplorer, getTurnCostStorage, wrapWeighting.
close_reason: Created Graph + AllEdgesIterator interfaces in core/storage/graph.go

title: Port EncodedValue interfaces
description: Port EncodedValue.java (root interface + InitializerConfig), BooleanEncodedValue.java, IntEncodedValue.java, DecimalEncodedValue.java, EncodedValueLookup.java. Pure interfaces.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement way geometry read/write
description: Port BaseGraph.fetchWayGeometry_ and setWayGeometry_. Read/write pillar node coordinates from wayGeometry DataAccess. Uses FetchMode to control which points are included.
close_reason: Implemented way geometry: setWayGeometry, fetchWayGeometry, createWayGeometryBytes with 2D/3D support

title: Port RoutingAlgorithm interface + AbstractRoutingAlgorithm (M8)
close_reason: RoutingAlgorithm interface + AbstractRoutingAlgorithm + TraversalMode ported

title: Refactor M5 LocationIndex code (idiomatic Go cleanup)
close_reason: Refactoring complete: removed 8 redundant getters, renamed GetBits->Bits, GetDeltaLat->DeltaLat, replaced C-style loops with range, direct field access in same-package code, consolidated CalcSnappedPoint logic. All tests pass.

title: Fix EncodedValueLookup missing methods
description: Add GetEnumEncodedValue and GetStringEncodedValue to the EncodedValueLookup interface in core/routing/ev/encoded_value_lookup.go. Java has 7 methods, Go has 5.
close_reason: Added GetStringEncodedValue to EncodedValueLookup

title: Run parity check on core/storage/index after M5
close_reason: Parity check complete: 7/7 source files matched, 18/18 LocationIndexTree tests ported. 2 minor test gaps: PixelGridTraversalTest (1 test) and SnapTest (1 test)

title: Port Dijkstra routing algorithm (M8)
description: Port Dijkstra shortest-path algorithm for flexible routing mode. Includes: SPTEntry (priority queue entry), Dijkstra.java, AbstractRoutingAlgorithm.java base, Path.java (route result with distance/time/points). This is the minimum needed to compute actual routes. Ref: Dijkstra.java (~150 lines), AbstractRoutingAlgorithm.java, Path.java, SPTEntry.java
close_reason: Dijkstra algorithm + AlgorithmOptions + CalcWeightWithTurnWeight + sptEntryHeap ported with 27 tests

title: End-to-end route test against GH baseline (M14)
description: End-to-end test: gohopper route --config=config.yml --point=43.7,7.42 --point=43.73,7.41 against a real monaco graph-cache. Compare output (distance, time, number of points) against GraphHopper Java baseline. Also test via HTTP: start gohopper server, query /route endpoint, compare JSON response structure.

title: Port IntEncodedValueImpl + SimpleBooleanEncodedValue
description: Port IntEncodedValueImpl.java (core bit-packing: fwd/bwd data indices, shifts, masks, negate reverse, min/max tracking) and SimpleBooleanEncodedValue.java (1-bit wrapper). Port IntEncodedValueImplTest (15 tests) and BooleanEncodedValueTest (4 tests).
close_reason: Closed

title: Port SPTEntry priority queue entry (M8)
close_reason: SPTEntry ported with full test coverage

title: Port EdgeIntAccess interface + IntsRefEdgeIntAccess
description: Port EdgeIntAccess.java (interface: getInt(edgeId, index), setInt(edgeId, index, value)) and IntsRefEdgeIntAccess.java (wraps IntsRef). Also port ArrayEdgeIntAccess for tests.
close_reason: Closed

title: Integration test: load real GH graph-cache (M3)
description: Fixture-based integration test: generate a small graph-cache with Java GraphHopper (monaco.osm.gz), commit it to testdata/, then write a Go test that calls GraphHopper.load() and verifies: node count, edge count, bounds, a few node coordinates, edge properties, and LocationIndex.FindClosest returns correct results. This proves the full storage layer works against real data.

title: Port FetchMode + EdgeFilter
description: Port FetchMode.java (enum: TOWER_ONLY, PILLAR_ONLY, BASE_AND_PILLAR, PILLAR_AND_ADJ, ALL) and EdgeFilter.java (interface: accept(EdgeIteratorState) + ALL_EDGES constant).
close_reason: Closed

title: Complete EncodingManager turn-cost accessors + createEdgeFlags
close_reason: EncodingManager turn-cost accessors added with 3 tests

title: Implement GraphHopper.load() to read graph-cache (M3)
description: Implement GraphHopper.load() — the real graph-cache loading path. Steps: create GHDirectory for ghLocation, load StorableProperties, call EncodingManager.fromProperties, build BaseGraph with correct bytesForFlags/3D/turnCosts, call baseGraph.LoadExisting(), validate stored profiles match config, call postProcessing (initLocationIndex). Replace the current stub ImportOrLoad() with real load-or-import logic. Ref: GraphHopper.java lines 1100-1172
close_reason: GraphHopper.load() wired - loads properties, EncodingManager, BaseGraph from disk

title: Port EncodingManager.fromProperties (M3)
description: Port EncodingManager.fromProperties() — deserialize encoded values from StorableProperties. Reads graph.em.version, graph.em.bytes_for_flags, graph.encoded_values, graph.turn_encoded_values from properties and reconstructs the encoded value registry. Also port EncodedValueSerializer.deserializeEncodedValue(). This is the critical missing piece for loading a GH-generated graph-cache. Ref: EncodingManager.java lines 58-90, EncodedValueSerializer.java
close_reason: EncodingManager + EncodedValueSerializer + VehicleAccess/Speed helpers ported

title: Port remaining BaseGraphTest + TurnCostStorageTest
description: Port remaining BaseGraphTest (7 tests), TurnCostStorageTest (4 tests), StorablePropertiesTest (6 tests).
close_reason: 7 BaseGraphTest tests ported (SaveAndFreeze, DimMismatch, DecoupledEdges, etc). TurnCostStorage tests skipped - Go missing high-level set/get methods

title: Port Weighting interface + FastestWeighting (M8)
description: Port Weighting interface and FastestWeighting/ShortestWeighting implementations. Weighting.calcEdgeWeight(edge, reverse) returns the cost of traversing an edge. FastestWeighting uses speed encoded values. ShortestWeighting uses distance. These are required by all routing algorithms. Ref: Weighting.java, FastestWeighting.java, ShortestWeighting.java
close_reason: Weighting interface + SpeedWeighting + TurnCostProvider ported

title: Port AccessFilter + DirectedEdgeFilter + FiniteWeightFilter
close_reason: AccessFilter + DirectedEdgeFilter + FiniteWeightFilter ported with tests

These are needed before EdgeIteratorStateImpl can be fully implemented.
close_reason: Added Enum/String methods to EdgeIteratorState interface

title: Fix RoadAccess enum parity
